Really excited about my #kubecon talk - it's all about how to make your AI pipeline better with observability. But NOT about the model ... it's about the data flowing into it.

Sunday morning 5km in Amsterdam, weather was nice today for a run.

Good start before kubecon, looking forward to spend next few days with the community 
#garmin #beatyesterday

Sadly, I will not be at KubeCon this week. To show all my kubernaut friends just how much I miss you, I have a small gift.

If you missed out on getting a deck of Exploding Clusters cards, well now you can play online.

exploding.k8s.io

Go easy on me, it's just a "free time" project.

Have fun!

Kubernetes gets much easier to manage when Git becomes the source of truth for your deployments. Here, Olumoko shows you how to implement GitOps on Kubernetes with Argo CD + GitHub Actions. You'll learn how to automate stuff, deploy manifests from Git, & more.
www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-to-...

about to fly to amsterdam for kubecon, first time out of north america 

gonna be hosteling around europe for a month after like the teenager i refuse to admit i'm not 

wish me luck!

Career update: I’m founding engineer for a k8s native cluster orchestration team to expand ml workload scheduling options. 😭🙏❤️

I cried. I laughed.
Monkigras (resilience theme, every talk hit). Paris with @betty now headed to KubeCon EU. FluxCon, KubeAuto Day, & a women's panel Wednesday at the AWS booth I'm really looking forward to.
It's been a hard season. This  community is why I'm here.

Cluster API provides a powerful abstraction layer for managing Kubernetes clusters across different cloud providers, explains Zain Malik. It enables multi-cloud capabilities through standardized abstractions

Watch the full episode: https://ku.bz/5PLksqVlk

Wondering what's new with Crossplane v2.2?

Hear from maintainer and release manager Adam Wolfe Gordon on what shipped in v2.2.

👀  blog.crossplane.io/crossplane-v2-2-more-capable-more-reliable-more-observable/ 

#Crossplane #Kubernetes #PlatformEngineering

🐿️  Sidequest alert.

Building a custom Crossplane composition function that lets you write your logic in Starlark.

The gap I see? Nothing out there combines Python-like simplicity with Go template speed. 

So I'm making one.

#Crossplane #Kubernetes #BuildInPublic

Claude Code の動きがブラックボックスで不安な人へ。最近のアップデートで標準対応した OpenTelemetry、もう設定した？🚀

ツール実行のログやプロンプトの履歴を Grafana 等で可視化すれば、「なぜその修正をしたか」の意図が手に取るように分かる。開発者のレビュー負荷を下げるには、この可視化こそが最強の近道かも。

recent_posts.text: 🎯 OpenTelemetryは『AIの行動ログ』。トレース・メトリクス・ログが統一フォーマットで流れる。Claude Codeがどの関数で何秒かけてるか丸見え。
